narration: What if I told you nerves communicate through a traveling spike of electricity?

narration: This electric spike, known as the action potential, is essential for sending signals in your body.
visual_description: Context visual: This electric spike, known as the action potential, is essential for sending signals in your body.

narration: Imagine billions of these spikes racing down neurons, orchestrating everything from a twitch to a thought.
visual_description: Escalation visual: Imagine billions of these spikes racing down neurons, orchestrating everything from a twitch to a thought.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: Imagine billions of these spikes racing down neurons, orchestrating everything from a twitch to a thought.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: Imagine billions of these spikes racing down neurons, orchestrating everything from a twitch to a thought.

narration: When a neuron fires, it opens ion channels, allowing sodium to rush in, creating that spike. Then, potassium flows out to reset the neuron.

narration: This rapid ion exchange travels down the neuron at lightning speed, relaying vital information throughout your body — all without you even knowing it.
